mapper.select: select count(1) from lkt_group_product a inner join lkt_product_list b on a.product_id=b.id

SELECT a.id, a.store_id, a.group_title, a.attr_id, a.product_id, a.group_level, a.group_data, a.starttime, a.endtime, a.activity_no, a.g_status, a.is_show, a.is_delete, a.is_copy, a.platform_activities_id, a.mch_id, a.audit_status, a.reason, a.num, a.sales_volume, a.price, a.addtime, a.free_freight FROM ( SELECT a.id, a.store_id, a.group_title, a.attr_id, a.product_id, a.group_level, a.group_data, a.starttime, a.endtime, a.activity_no, a.g_status, a.is_show, a.is_delete, a.is_copy, a.platform_activities_id, a.mch_id, a.audit_status, a.reason, a.num, a.sales_volume, a.price, a.addtime, a.free_freight, ROW_NUMBER() over ( PARTITION BY a.activity_no ) AS top FROM lkt_group_product a ) AS a
and a.is_delete = 0
a.add_time ${add_time_sort},
limit #{pageStart},#{pageEnd}

select
count(distinct a.activity_no) count(1)
from lkt_group_product a,lkt_product_list b
and a.product_id=b.id and a.is_delete = 0

SELECT g.attr_id, g.shopname, g.group_title, g.product_id, g.group_level, g.group_data, g.g_status, g.is_show, g.product_title, g.STATUS, g.product_class, g.imgurl, g.price, g.pid, g.activity_no, g.is_copy, g.id, g.store_id, g.is_delete, g.platform_activities_id FROM ( SELECT min( g.attr_id ) over(partition by g.activity_no) AS attr_id, m.NAME AS shopname, g.group_title, g.product_id, g.group_level, g.group_data, CASE WHEN g.g_status = 1 THEN 1 WHEN g.endtime < now() OR g.g_status = 3 THEN 3 ELSE 2 END AS g_status, g.is_show, p.product_title, p.STATUS, p.product_class, p.imgurl, MIN( c.price ) over(partition by g.activity_no) AS price, p.id AS pid, g.activity_no, g.is_copy, g.id, g.store_id, g.is_delete, g.platform_activities_id, ROW_NUMBER() over(partition by g.activity_no) AS top FROM lkt_group_product AS g LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list AS p ON g.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN lkt_configure AS c ON g.attr_id = c.id LEFT JOIN lkt_mch AS m ON p.mch_id = m.id ) AS g
and g.store_id = #{store_id} and g.is_delete = 0 and g.platform_activities_id =0 and g.g_status = #{g_status} and g.product_title like concat('%',#{product_title},'%') and g.top <2
g.g_status ${g_status_sort},
limit #{pageStart},#{pageEnd}

select count(distinct g.activity_no) from lkt_group_product as g left join lkt_product_list as p on g.product_id=p.id left join lkt_configure as c on g.attr_id=c.id left join lkt_mch as m on p.mch_id=m.id where g.is_delete = 0

SELECT a.id, a.attr_id, a.product_id, a.store_id, a.group_level, a.g_status, a.group_data, a.sum, a.image, a.market_price, a.pro_name, a.pro_name1, a.imageurl, a.STATUS, a.recycle, a.activity_no, a.is_show, a.starttime, a.endtime, a.platform_activities_id, a.audit_status, a.sales_volume, a.is_delete, a.addtime, a.is_open FROM ( SELECT p.id, min( p.attr_id ) over ( PARTITION BY p.activity_no ) AS attr_id, ROW_NUMBER() over ( PARTITION BY p.activity_no ) AS top, p.product_id, p.store_id, p.group_level, p.g_status, p.group_data, s.sum, c.img AS image, c.price AS market_price, p.group_title AS pro_name, l.product_title AS pro_name1, l.imgurl AS imageurl, l.STATUS, l.recycle, p.activity_no, p.is_show, p.starttime, p.endtime, p.platform_activities_id, p.audit_status, p.sales_volume, p.is_delete, p.addtime, m.is_open FROM lkt_group_product AS p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sum( o.num ) AS sum, d.p_id FROM lkt_go_group_order AS o LEFT JOIN lkt_go_group_order_details AS d ON o.sNo = d.r_sNo WHERE o.store_id = #{store_id} and o.status>0 and o.status != 6 and o.otype='pt' GROUP BY d.p_id ) AS s ON p.product_id = s.p_id LEFT JOIN lkt_configure AS c ON p.attr_id = c.id LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list AS l ON p.product_id = l.id LEFT JOIN lkt_mch AS m ON m.id = l.mch_id LEFT JOIN lkt_group_config AS conf ON m.store_id = conf.store_id ) AS a
a.store_id = #{store_id} AND a.is_open = 1 AND a.is_show = 1 AND a.STATUS = 2 AND a.recycle = 0 AND a.is_delete = 0 AND a.starttime != '0000-00-00 00:00:00' AND a.endtime != '0000-00-00 00:00:00' and a.g_status=#{g_status} and a.g_status!=1 and a.starttime < date_add(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,interval #{startTime_GT_HOUR} HOUR)
and a.top <2
a.`addtime` ${addtime_sort},
limit #{pageStart},#{pageEnd}

SELECT m.*, c.img AS image, c.price AS market_price, (SELECT IF ( max(num) IS NULL, 0, max(num)) num FROM lkt_configure WHERE pid = #{goodsId} and num > 0) num FROM (SELECT ANY_VALUE(attr_id) attr_id, ANY_VALUE(g.product_id) product_id, ANY_VALUE(g.group_level) group_level, ANY_VALUE(g.group_data) group_data, ANY_VALUE(g.g_status) g_status, ANY_VALUE(l.product_title) AS pro_name, ANY_VALUE(l.content) content, ANY_VALUE(l.`status`) `status`, ANY_VALUE(l.imgurl) imgurl, ANY_VALUE(l.mch_id) mch_id, g.activity_no, ANY_VALUE(g.is_show) is_show, ANY_VALUE(g.free_freight) free_freight FROM lkt_group_product g LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list l ON g.product_id = l.id WHERE g.store_id = #{storeId} AND g.product_id = #{goodsId} AND g.is_delete = 0 AND g.activity_no = #{activityId} GROUP BY g.activity_no) m LEFT JOIN lkt_configure c ON m.attr_id = c.id LIMIT 0, 1

SELECT p.id, p.attr_id, p.sales_volume AS sum, p.product_id, p.group_level, p.g_status, p.group_data, s.sum AS sum_total, c.img AS image, c.price AS market_price, p.group_title AS pro_name, l.product_title AS pro_name1, l.imgurl AS imageurl, p.activity_no, p.platform_activities_id, p.audit_status FROM ( SELECT gp.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY gp.activity_no ORDER BY gp.id DESC ) AS rn FROM lkt_group_product gp WHERE gp.store_id = 1 AND gp.is_show = 1 AND gp.g_status = 2 AND gp.is_delete = 0 ) p LEFT JOIN ( SELECT SUM (o.num) AS sum, d.p_id FROM lkt_order o LEFT JOIN lkt_order_details d ON o.sNo = d.r_sNo WHERE o.store_id = #{storeId} AND o.`STATUS` > 0 AND o.`STATUS` != 6 AND o.otype = 'pt' GROUP BY d.p_id ) s ON p.product_id = s.p_id LEFT JOIN lkt_configure c ON p.attr_id = c.id LEFT JOIN lkt_product_list l ON p.product_id = l.id WHERE p.rn = 1 -- 只取每个活动编号的最新记录 AND l.`status` = 2 AND l.recycle = 0 ORDER BY p.id DESC limit #{pageStart}, #{pageEnd}
